metaTitle: Flea Treatment NYC | Flea Extermination | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea elimination for NYC homes with pets. Treats all life stages including eggs and larvae. Free inspection. 30-day guarantee. Call now.
h1: Flea Treatment in NYC — Eliminated at Every Life Stage
heroParagraph: Fleas are harder to eliminate than most pet owners expect because the adult fleas you see are only about 5% of the total infestation. The other 95% are eggs, larvae, and pupae living in carpet fibers, bedding, and furniture upholstery. Effective flea treatment must address all four life stages simultaneously — which requires professional-grade IGR treatments combined with targeted adulticide applications.
